relative_path: Data & Figures/Data/1. t-CycIF/4_4 - PRITTI cohort experiment/4_4 analysis files/2.Clustering_attempts/10.24 - Gaussian Mixtures.pptx
full_text:
Gaussian Mixtures

GMM models were fit to

nplog- clipped - minmax values (all cell-types)
4 component GMM [ 'CyclinD1', 'p21', 'Geminin','Ki67', 'PCNA','pRb', 'pH3', "MPM-2", 'CyclinB1']
Then it was classified which level (bg,low,med,hi) was correlated with real signal by visual assessment in a set of images randomly chosen
to get continuous variables, per marker, clusters classified as bg or not true signal received a score of 0, while (per image) the rest was 0-1 scaled

GMM clusters can be spotted consistently across slides regardless contrast

MPM-2 (med/hi) in two slides

BIRCH clustering over continuous score from GMMs in tumor cells identifies 3 clusters

BIRCH clusters are consistent with stainings

Class 2
pH3 MPM-2

Class 1
pRb GMN

Class1 was essentially everything else

threshold=0.1

gmm 8 c

0- G2?
1-ARR
2-G1

3- S
4-??
5-M
6?
7??

WITHOUT THE LOW-MED SCALING 
CATEGORIES JUST HI-LO WITH NO MINMAX

WITHOUT THE LOW-MED SCALING 
CATEGORIES JUST HI-LO WITH NO MINMAX
